name: @ggui/mcp-host-create
description: Domain MCP server for the host-create flow: the agent drafts a community travel event proposal and echoes a validated structured payload (host_create_apply) back for the human host to review + apply to the form. Display-only product suggestions (host_recommend_products) + a safety linter (host_safety_check). No side effects, no merchant/booking behavior. Not published.
